items.title: Rapid Onboarding
items.text: Launch quickly with a guided setup checklist, stakeholder alignment, and clear first-week actions.

items.title: Mobile Requests
items.text: Submit requests from any device, track progress, and confirm details without back-and-forth.

items.title: Special Packages
items.text: Mix monthly plans, project bundles, and add-ons to match changing workload and team capacity.

items.title: Priority Support
items.text: Get escalation paths, response targets, and continuity support when timelines are critical.
